title: July 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 24''' is the 205th day (206th in leap years) of the year, with 160 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1978]] – [[Gabe Eltaeb]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Rose Byrne]] is born.
*1979 – [[Star Wars (1977) 28|''Star Wars'' (1977) 28]] published.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 126|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 126]] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal Collector's Edition]]'' published in UK.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 30]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Star Wars Insider 95|''Star Wars Insider'' 95]] published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: Lost Tribe of the Sith: The Collected Stories]]'' released. It included the final novella ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Pandemonium]]''.
*2012 – [[Star Wars Insider 135|''Star Wars Insider'' 135]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Legacy (2013) 5|''Legacy'' (2013) 5]] published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: Dawn of the Jedi Book Two—Prisoner of Bogan]]'' published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: Agent of the Empire Volume 2—Hard Targets]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Thrawn: Alliances]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars Insider 191|''Star Wars Insider'' 191]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 69|''Star Wars'' (2015) 69]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[David Warner]] dies.
*[[2024]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 48|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 48]] published.
<noinclude>
